dc_description: A two-lane rural asphalt road stretches into the distance under bright daylight. The road surface is visibly cracked and patched, with white lane markings and a solid shoulder line on the right. Dry grasses, shrubs, scattered trees, utility poles, and open fields border both sides. The scene has a warm, slightly hazy look with no visible vehicles or pedestrians.
novel_visual_observations: The right roadside vegetation is mostly dry and brown, suggesting an arid or late-season environment. The asphalt has numerous branching cracks concentrated in the foreground and center of the lane.
rich_context: Ciclabile Campagnano-Nepi, Campagnano di Roma, Roma Capitale, Lazio, 00063, Italia
